# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported | Description               |
| ------- | :-------: | ------------------------- |
| Stable  |    ✅     | Latest stable release     |
| LTS     |    ✅     | Long-term support         |
| Canary  |           | Development purposes only |
| Older   |           | Upgrade recommended       |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please use [security.txt](https://hqsy.net/.well-known/security.txt) to report a vulnerability.

You can expect a response within 48 hours if you are a human reporting a genuine issue.

Thank you in advance.
